body:
## What this ships / ما الذي يُسلَّم

A real, deployable **public services website** + the **founder operating kit** to make the company sellable now — all approval-first, all wired to real data, zero fabricated leads.

### 1) `apps/web` — Services + Custom AI surfaces
| Route | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/services` · `/ar/services` | Full offering ladder (Free Diagnostic → 499 Sprint → 1,500 Data Pack → 2,999/mo Growth Ops → Support add-on → 7,500/mo Executive Command Center → Agency Partner) + **Command Sprint** flagship + governance strip. Bilingual, RTL. |
| `/custom` · `/ar/custom` | **"Tell us what to build"** (وش تبي نسوّي) — approval-first request form → governed `/api/v1/leads` intake, with a graceful `mailto` fallback so no request is ever lost. |
| `lib/offerings.ts` | Typed **bilingual mirror** of the canonical registry (`auto_client_acquisition/service_catalog/registry.py`). Force-added — `lib/` is gitignored (Python-artifact pattern, per `AGENTS.md`). |

Services + Custom are wired into the EN/AR home navigation.

**Verified locally:** `npm run typecheck` ✅ and `next build` ✅ (all new routes prerender static).

### 2) `sales/` — founder operating kit (authored approval-first; no fake leads)
- `DAILY_DRAFTS_SOP_AR.md` + `daily_drafts/SAMPLE_PACK_AR.md` — the daily draft loop (drafts only, **manual send**; references `scripts/warm_list_outreach.py`).
- `LEAD_INTAKE_FRAMEWORK_AR.md` + `target_segments.csv` — a **lawful** pipeline framework; the segment seed leaves `company_name` **blank** (no invented names/numbers; every row carries a `lawful_source`).
- `CALL_KIT_AR.md` — bilingual 20-minute discovery script + call tracker.

## Doctrine / الالتزام
AI drafts and analyses → **human approves and sends**. No scraping, no cold WhatsApp/LinkedIn automation, no guaranteed outcomes, no auto-send, no live charge. Every customer-facing surface ends with the bilingual value disclaimer: *Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة.*

## Scope notes
- This PR is **additive** — it does not touch billing, secrets, deploy, or `main`. It is **not** a duplicate of the launch-ops docs already in #650/#651.
- Two product decisions remain founder-owned and are documented (not guessed here): the **billing free-tier money-safety** drift (`PLANS` currently includes 0‑SAR offerings → `tests/test_billing_*` drift) is best fixed in #650; the **Command Sprint pricing** (7,500–15,000) reconciliation belongs in `docs/30_pricing/SPRINT_PRICING.md`.
- Real lead data and actual outreach/calls stay founder-only (lawful sourcing + approval-first), and this PR ships the framework to do exactly that.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NBcoeGdGPzo5ToF39x8jfh

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01NBcoeGdGPzo5ToF39x8jfh)_

  Agency Partner) + Command Sprint flagship + governance strip, bilingual RTL.
- /custom + /ar/custom — approval-first "tell us what to build" request form
  → governed /api/v1/leads intake, with graceful mailto fallback. No auto-send.
- lib/offerings.ts — typed bilingual mirror of the canonical registry
  (auto_client_acquisition/service_catalog/registry.py). Force-added: lib/ is
  gitignored (Python-artifact pattern, see AGENTS.md).
- Wire Services + Custom into EN/AR home navigation.

sales/ founder operating kit (approval-first, no fabricated leads):
- DAILY_DRAFTS_SOP_AR.md + daily_drafts/SAMPLE_PACK_AR.md — daily draft loop
  (drafts only, manual send; references scripts/warm_list_outreach.py).
- LEAD_INTAKE_FRAMEWORK_AR.md + target_segments.csv — lawful pipeline framework;
  segment seed with company_name LEFT BLANK (no invented names/numbers).
- CALL_KIT_AR.md — bilingual 20-min discovery script + call tracker.

Doctrine: AI drafts, human approves & sends. No scraping, no cold automation,
no guaranteed outcomes; every customer-facing surface ends with the bilingual
value disclaimer.
